{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032303403009A5A238B4085A8F8E29"}"},"total":857},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7557462365124739865","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这本书真的让我看到了每个人物独特的味道，而不是粗略的写没有一点人物特征，每一个角色是鲜活的，作者大大很棒！继续加油保持质量，别烂尾！！！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1759617895,"group_id":"7494206892118379545","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"什么写小说谁写？你吗？","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N2FKA1dTpTVaF1EIo4sPpw9F3Q85qMgfvk47m0yK67EX","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/0ee16183244842deb049ed732e4c97b1~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776792402&x-signature=RLNv1baCJZSEbZJzUbPBosofqcY%3D","user_id":"4230559391041512","user_name":"法内穷鬼"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4230559391041512","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7494206892118379545","book_info":{"abstract":"（爽文+系统提前登录+娱乐圈+多女主）
二十岁刚签约演艺公司的付泽，忽然被系统找上门，连带着看到他高开低走地狱结局的前半生剧本。
但是！等等...系统你是不是早来了十五年？
【被泼了一身脏水的你澄清失败，控诉无门并背负巨额赔偿金，最终选择站上了天台，结束这草草一生。
任务：离开天台，重新燃起生命的希望，奖励：偿还欠房东的三个月资金】
只要...从天台下来就行吗？
看着回踏一步就是卧室的小阳台。
这不纯纯白给！
沦落到人人喊打跳楼自杀的一切的起因竟然是在即将参加恋综里种下？看着未来人生剧本，付泽坚定信念，只有搞钱搞事业才是正途！恋爱？狗都不谈！
但是傲娇的大小姐、性感的网红一姐、还有国民闺女，怎么一个一个的都缠了上来？","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b05449ec25c121f5fe9cb16be9cdbb27","author":"岁墨白","author_id":"","book_id":"7494206892118379545","book_name":"绑定洗白系统？可现在是十五年前","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#101018","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"4万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":262,"name":"都市脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=262&name=都市脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":43,"name":"娱乐圈","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=43&name=娱乐圈&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":91,"name":"多女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=91&name=多女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":519,"name":"大小姐","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=519&name=大小姐&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7494207013090509374","read_count":"39671","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1510071"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"6.9","serial_count":"721","tags":"都市脑洞,都市,系统,娱乐圈,多女主,大小姐","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/7bec0f5734e841cbf8d0cdc6494b1aa0~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779392430&x-signature=KWXOvdZjOoZlkMs39KhgqSS12C0%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"101007610855","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"406"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032303403009A5A238B4085A8F8E29"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读10小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":9,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":37744,"reply_count":2,"show_pv":21171},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7526949229138395966","common":{"comment_type":31,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"喜欢。简直不敢相信系统所说的人生是付泽的。他赤忱，有爱心，有责任心，就是有点逃避爱情，比较中央空调。这样的人做朋友是极好的，暧昧也不错，虽说可能不是很适合做爱人，但也能给人以安全感。他以搞笑男的面貌出现在大众面前，又用才华与人品征服众人，得了“魅魔”的称号。即使没有系统，在他往后的15年人生里，他创作出了十余首大火的歌曲，也表现出了他的才华。值得一看。作者请纵笔至星球黯淡。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1752509866,"group_id":"7494206892118379545","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"存在本身就是意义。你是先被世界选中的，才降临到世间。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N7Y26pY1Z7uxlYKqHHv843vi4dwVCdiYxJCxHmHqUvvY","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/f0512d04be6549c0b974a1b8e10771a8~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776791268&x-signature=Db%2Foat5oML2%2BgWa9I7EomFpCnHk%3D","user_id":"2186292280694983","user_name":"一串美好"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2186292280694983","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7494206892118379545","book_info":{"abstract":"（爽文+系统提前登录+娱乐圈+多女主）

但是！等等...系统你是不是早来了十五年？
